summary: Completed comprehensive testing of enCARE Sync and Onboarding Profile features. All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all sync dashboard functionality, import to CRM button, onboarding profile page with sync status bar, and navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Sync endpoints use MOCK data (MOCK_ENCARE_PATIENTS, MOCK_ENCARE_VITALS dicts) - this is intentional per requirements
All sync and onboarding endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Proper error handling with 404 responses for invalid patient IDs and unsynced patients
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used /api/seed endpoint to reset database for testing Import to CRM functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sync and onboarding features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: GET /api/sync/encare-patients, POST /api/sync/patient/{id}, POST /api/sync/medications/{id}, POST /api/sync/vitals/{id}, GET /api/sync/status, GET /api/sync/status/{patient_id}, GET /api/patients/{id}/onboarding, PUT /api/patients/{id}/onboarding. Frontend tests verified: Sync Dashboard page loads with 3 enCARE patients, Import to CRM button works, Onboarding page loads with pre-filled data, Edit Profile button navigates correctly, Save Profile works, Sync status bar shows for synced patients, enCARE Sync nav item visible in sidebar.

sync_endpoints.GET /api/sync/encare-patients: PASS - Lists 3 enCARE patients (ENC001, ENC002, ENC003) with sync status
sync_endpoints.POST /api/sync/patient/{id}: PASS - Creates/updates patient from mock enCARE data
sync_endpoints.POST /api/sync/medications/{id}: PASS - Syncs medications for already-synced patient
sync_endpoints.POST /api/sync/vitals/{id}: PASS - Syncs vitals (blood glucose, BP) for synced patient
sync_endpoints.GET /api/sync/status/{patient_id}: PASS - Returns patient-specific sync status with logs

onboarding_endpoints.GET /api/patients/{id}/onboarding: PASS - Returns full onboarding profile with all enCARE-aligned fields
onboarding_endpoints.PUT /api/patients/{id}/onboarding: PASS - Updates profile with all fields (name, email, phone, age, sex, address, city, state, pincode, country, diabetes_type, relative_name, etc.)

frontend_features.Sync Dashboard at /sync: PASS - Shows 3 enCARE patients with correct sync status
frontend_features.Import to CRM button: PASS - Works correctly, shows success toast, updates UI
frontend_features.Onboarding page at /patients/:id/onboard: PASS - Loads with pre-filled form data
frontend_features.Save Profile button: PASS - Saves changes with success toast
frontend_features.Sync status bar for synced patients: PASS - Shows enCARE link, last synced time, sync buttons

mocked_apis_note: Sync endpoints use MOCK_ENCARE_PATIENTS and MOCK_ENCARE_VITALS dicts in server.py to simulate enCARE app data. This is intentional per requirements - NOT real API calls to enCARE.
